generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've lived in this neighborhood for 30 years, and let me tell you, our community thrives because we all share the same values. When we start letting in too many people who don't understand our way of life, things get complicated. I'm not against immigration, but we need to be careful. Remember when they tried to build that new community center? It divided us for months. We can't afford that kind of tension again. #CommunityFirst
